description: The shipyard will focus on both defense and commercial vessels, the company announced today.

description: The FT reports Kimi K3 will be the largest open AI model from China, with a parameter count between 2 trillion and 3 trillion.

title: Icarus Robotics uses KULR technology to power JOY free-flying space robot
description:

title: New bill would ban Tesla’s camera-only Robotaxi, not Waymo
description:

title: Contriving Imaginary Gaps in Nuclear Deterrence
description: Among some nuclear strategists, military officers, and lawmakers, a belief bordering on the canonical has taken root that the United States is on the short end of a “deterrence gap” with Russia and China. title: Summit sells failed antibiotic to OpenAI-backed startup in $105M deal
description: Summit Therapeutics has cleared out an asset from its pre-ivonescimab history, offloading the antibiotic drug candidate ridinilazole to the OpenAI-backed startup Biossil for $500,000 upfront.

title: AAIC: Biogen bolsters hopes for Alzheimer's pivotal push as anti-tau oligo slows cognitive decline
description: Biogen's leading tau-targeting candidate has slowed cognitive decline across a suite of different clinical assessments, backing up the pharma’s decision to race the molecule into phase 3 development.
